title: Add Zen Mode for distraction-free board view

source.notes: Our own PR to upstream. Port it into our fork directly. Upstream may or may not merge it.

description: Zen Mode hides all UI chrome (sidebar, top bar, tabs, analysis/notation panels) and centers the board for a distraction-free experience. Toggle via Shift+Z shortcut or sidebar icon. Escape to exit. Board auto-centers and expands to fill available space. Persisted in localStorage. Works across analysis, play, and puzzle modes.
notes: 8 files changed in the upstream PR, ~334 lines of diff

CUSTOM ICONS: We have our own zen icon set at .icons/zen/svg/ (20 SVGs from Flaticon). Use one of these instead of tabler's IconYoga. Good candidates: 015-zen.svg, 006-meditation.svg, 007-meditate.svg
The upstream PR uses IconYoga from @tabler/icons-react — replace with our custom SVG
Since this is OUR PR, the code was written against upstream's codebase. Our fork has diverged (TTS atoms, custom CSS, etc.) so there may be minor merge conflicts

Key files: Sidebar.tsx (zen toggle icon), BoardsPage.tsx (zen layout logic), Board.tsx (auto-resize), __root.tsx (hide top bar/sidebar), atoms.ts (zenModeAtom), keybinds.ts (Shift+Z), SettingsPage.tsx (zen toggle in settings), react-mosaic.css (zen styles)

in_scope: Add zenModeAtom to atoms.ts (persisted in localStorage)
Add zen toggle icon to Sidebar.tsx using custom SVG from .icons/zen/
Hide sidebar, top bar, tabs, and side panels when zen mode is active
Auto-center and expand board to fill available space
Hover left edge shows reminder tooltip
Add zen mode toggle to Settings page
CSS for zen mode transitions in react-mosaic.css
out_of_scope: Custom zen icon design (we already have icons)
Zen mode for non-board pages (databases, puzzles list, etc.)
Auto-hide cursor in zen mode (future enhancement)

requirements: Shift+Z toggles zen mode on and off
All UI chrome hidden in zen mode (sidebar, top bar, tabs, panels)
Board fills available space and centers
Zen mode state persists across page refreshes (localStorage)
Works in analysis, play vs engine, and puzzle modes
TTS narration continues working in zen mode
edge_cases: Entering zen mode while engine is analyzing — analysis should continue
Entering zen mode while TTS is speaking — should continue
Resizing window in zen mode — board should adapt
Switching tabs while in zen mode
Opening settings while in zen mode (need escape hatch)

requirements: Toggling zen mode should be instant (no visible delay)

acceptance_gates: Board fills screen in zen mode
Custom zen icon visible in sidebar

manual: Open a game in analysis mode, press Shift+Z — all chrome should disappear, board centers
Click the zen icon in the sidebar — same behavior
Refresh the page while in zen mode — should still be in zen mode
Press Shift+Z during an engine game — game continues, just UI simplified
Enable TTS auto-narrate, enter zen mode, navigate moves — narration should still work
Hover left edge of screen in zen mode — should see reminder tooltip
Check Settings page — zen mode toggle should be present
Resize window in zen mode — board should adapt

done_criteria: Zen mode toggles via Shift+Z, sidebar icon, and Escape to exit
Custom zen SVG icon in sidebar (from .icons/zen/)
All UI chrome hidden in zen mode
TTS continues working in zen mode
Manual testing confirms all modes work
